ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_series" (
  "series_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each data series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the data series */,
  "series_type" TEXT /* Type of data series (e.g., inflation rate, employment rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data series */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data series (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data series */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data series (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the series was updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_series_type FOREIGN KEY ("series_type") REFERENCES series_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_series_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the series type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Typical frequency of the series type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Typical unit of measurement for the series type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the source */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the source information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "series_id" TEXT /* Reference to the data series being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the series */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the series was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES data_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "revised_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "revised_at" TEXT /* Exact time the revision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_revised_by FOREIGN KEY ("revised_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "footnotes" (
  "footnote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each footnote */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point the footnote belongs to */,
  "footnote_code" TEXT /* Code for the footnote */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the footnote */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the footnote (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the footnote was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("footnote_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collection (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the collection was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the collection was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collection */,
  "series_id" TEXT /* Reference to the data series */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the series in the collection (e.g., included, excluded) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the series was updated in the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id", "series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series_sources" (
  "series_id" TEXT /* Reference to the data series */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the source for the series (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the source information was updated for the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id", "source_id")
)
